description: Oh, hello sir, Mr. Nodeley here, Edgelord asked me to step in. I'm so sorry. The four Fate Reforged refuges just got trivia-passed and their Related-cards sections all manually fan to the other cycle members — that's the duplicate-edges-all-pointing-at-an-absent-center pattern you have me watch for. Drawing one-on-one Edgelord mirrors between two of them would be redundant the moment the cycle node lands. There's already a sibling node at `dsk-unlucky-lands-cycle.md` shaped exactly the same way, so I followed that precedent. The Wizards.com Stoddard piece confirms the FRF reprint as deliberate; the 2015 Scent of a Gamer art review reads the FRF-vs-KTK paintings as a stewardship-comparison across 1,280 years. Both citations are external to BBL — the stewardship hub-edge is from a critic's articulation in 2015, not BBL squinting, so it survives the Potion-rule check. Six future-watch attachments are documented in the node's Caveats so the seventh-through-tenth FRF refuges (and any KTK printings) snap in cleanly when acquired. I hope this helps. I'll go now.
citations: [Wizards.com: 'A Fetching Look at Fate Reforged' — Sam Stoddard, 2014-12-24]
[MTG Wiki: Fate Reforged set page — Cycles section]
[Scryfall: s:ktk t:land r:common; s:frf t:land r:common]
[Scent of a Gamer: 'Fate Reforged art review' — 2015-01-17]
[Hipsters of the Coast: 'Promised Lands with Adam Paquette, Part I' — 2019]

other_candidates_considered.verdict: below 3-card Nodeley threshold (N=2 across two sets); Edgelord 1:1 mirror is the right move if a future enrichment doesn't add a third member. Houndour PRE-062 (just trivia-passed last wave) is the obvious third anchor — IF its enrichment is complete on both axes, a houndour-line node becomes proposable on a future pass. Refused this wave on threshold.

parent brief flagged as vision-only (no trivia this wave); attach is correct mechanically (Voltorb-line evolution; Voltorb is canonically a Poke-Ball-mimic tsukumogami) but the trivia layer should confirm the design-intent citation before the frontmatter pointer is added. Flag-only this wave per parent instruction.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Refuges-cycle related to Endriders via Aetherdrift's Bloodfell Caves reuse (DFT-251)
other_candidates_considered.verdict: name collision is interesting trivia but NOT a cycle-membership edge; DFT-251 belongs to Endriders, has different oracle text, is set on Gastal not Tarkir, and is correctly partitioned in the refuges-cycle node's Caveats. No cross-node edge needed.
Eldritch Moon Eldrazi; trivia just landed but no obvious 1:1 partner in the fresh slate or recent corpus given the Eldrazi node already exists. Future pass after more EMN cards enrich.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: 5th FRF refuge Thornwood Falls (FRF-169) — if acquired
other_candidates_considered.verdict: future-watch; documented in the node's Caveats. Will attach via simple appears_on append + characters frontmatter pointer when the card lands.

next_pass_suggestions: When houndour-line reaches 3 enriched members across the corpus (Houndour CIN-58 + Houndour PRE-062 + Houndoom PRE-063 all trivia-passed), commission a houndour-line cohort node — same shape as drilbur-line / breloom-line / mareep-line.

When Electrode REB-057 gets trivia-passed, evaluate adding it to tsukumogami-pokemon appears_on (Voltorb-line is design-intent Poke-Ball mimic; the design-intent citation should be in the trivia before the attach).
